Container.Name: StockWorks
Container.Overview: StockWorks tracks 3D printing materials, hardware, merch, inventory movements, quotes, incoming MakerWorks jobs, and PrintLab loaded-tray visibility.
Container.Requires: Strong admin password, strong session secret, mapped /data path, and Docker network makerworks-net.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the StockWorks web UI.

Config.Name: Appdata Storage
Config.Description: Persistent SQLite database and attachments.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns files written by StockWorks.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns files written by StockWorks.

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Optional PostgreSQL DSN. Leave blank for SQLite.

Config.Name: StockWorks DB Schema
Config.Description: Optional PostgreSQL schema for StockWorks-owned tables.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Internal StockWorks data directory.

Config.Name: Database Filename
Config.Description: SQLite filename under STOCKWORKS_DATA_DIR.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Admin login username.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Optional admin email.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Admin login password. Use a strong password.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Long random secret used to sign session cookies.

Config.Name: HTTPS-Only Session Cookie
Config.Description: Set 1 when StockWorks is accessed only via HTTPS.

Config.Name: PrintLab Base URL
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab URL used to read loaded AMS trays.

Config.Name: PrintLab API Key
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab API key.

Config.Name: PrintLab Bearer Token
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab bearer token.

Config.Name: PrintLab Username
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab username for Basic auth.

Config.Name: PrintLab Password
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab password for Basic auth.

Config.Name: PrintLab API Auth Header
Config.Description: Header name PrintLab expects for PRINTLAB_API_KEY.

Config.Name: PrintLab Trace Logging
Config.Description: Set 1 to enable PrintLab integration trace logs.
